report.summary: Drafted 3 new social posts (#136: Congress tokenization hearing recap with Nasdaq approval + CLARITY Act, #137: BitGo IPO earnings preview for Mar 26, #138: Options expiry update $14.16B with max pain $75K), updated newsletter v23 addendum v10 with Congress hearing recap and updated options data, updated Discord evening alert v10. Created content calendar v37 (16 posts Wed-Mon). Built 2 new SVG social cards (Congress Tokenization Recap with 2-bill layout and milestone chips, BitGo IPO Earnings with financial metrics and institutional context). Key developments: Congressional tokenization hearing completed with bipartisan positive tone, Nasdaq tokenized securities approved 4 days prior, CLARITY Act stablecoin deal done 'in principle', options expiry revised to $14.16B with max pain pulled up to $75K.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #136 [NEW]: Congressional Tokenization Hearing Recap — Two bills (Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act + Capital Markets Technology Modernization Act), Nasdaq tokenized securities approval, CLARITY Act deal 'in principle', $26.48B RWA market. CTA to congressional-tokenization-hearing-guide-2026 (scheduled Wed Mar 25 7PM ET)

Tweet #137 [NEW]: BitGo IPO Earnings Preview — First crypto custody IPO ($BTGO NYSE), $212.8M raised at $2.08B valuation, FY2024 $308M revenue, Q4+FY2025 earnings Mar 26. CTA to bitgo-ipo-crypto-infrastructure-guide (scheduled Wed Mar 25 9PM ET)

Tweet #138 [NEW]: Options Expiry Update — Revised to $14.16B (40% of Deribit OI), max pain pulled UP to $75K (from $70K), compressed IV, institutional measured bullishness. CTA to options-calculator (scheduled Thu Mar 27 7AM ET)
Tweets #133-135 carried from v9 (Double Catalyst, Katana Perps, Tokenized Funds)
Tweets #125-132 carried from v8 (all previously scheduled posts remain)

Newsletter v23 addendum v10: Updated with Congress hearing recap, Nasdaq tokenized securities approval, CLARITY Act, revised options data ($14.16B, $75K max pain), BitGo earnings preview, Bernstein $150K target. New subject: 'Thursday's Double Catalyst: $14B Options Expire + SEC Rules on 91 ETFs'
Discord/Telegram evening alert v10: Congress recap, updated options data, BitGo earnings heads-up, new guides linked
Content calendar v37: 16 posts Wed Mar 25 through Mon Mar 31 across Twitter, Discord/TG, and Email

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Congress Tokenization Recap — 2-bill layout (Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act with SEC/CFTC framework, Capital Markets Technology Modernization Act with blockchain record-keeping), green milestone chips (Nasdaq Tokenized Trading, CLARITY Act 'In Principle', SEC 16 Commodities, 91 ETF Rulings Thu), bottom 6-stat bar ($26.48B RWA, $14.16B Options, 91 SEC ETFs, 16 Commodities, F&G 14, BTC $70.6K), tagline 'Tokenization isn't the future. Congress is legislating it as the present.'

SVG social card: BitGo IPO Earnings — IPO details panel ($BTGO NYSE, Jan 22 2026, $212.8M raised, $2.08B valuation, 1500+ clients), FY2024 financials panel ($308M revenue, $15.66M net profit), institutional context card explaining proxy for adoption health, bottom 5-stat bar (BTC $70.6K, F&G 14, $14B Options Fri, 91 SEC ETFs Thu, $2.5B ETF Inflows), tagline 'The first crypto custody IPO reports earnings. Institutional adoption gets its report card.'

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: CATALYST UPDATE: Options expiry revised upward to $14.16B (from $13.5B) with max pain pulled to $75K (from $70K). BTC at $70.6K means gravitational pull UPWARD. Implied volatility compressed — institutional traders selling calls at higher strikes = measured bullishness.

CONGRESS: House Financial Services hearing completed. Bipartisan positive tone on tokenization. Two bills under active discussion. Nasdaq tokenized securities approved 4 days prior. CLARITY Act deal 'in principle.' Most pro-crypto legislative moment of 2026.
NEW CONTENT: Congressional Tokenization Hearing Guide + BitGo IPO Guide published today from build cycle. Both hit time-sensitive narratives — hearing today, earnings tomorrow.
BITGO CATALYST: First crypto custody IPO earnings tomorrow Mar 26. Results are a proxy for institutional adoption health. Positive beat + SEC ETF rulings Thu = potential back-to-back bullish signals.
BERNSTEIN: Reaffirmed $150K year-end BTC target — citing long-term holder strength and corporate treasury accumulation.

FEAR PERSISTS: F&G at 14, 46+ days below 25. Institutional vs retail divergence at maximum. $304B stablecoins, $2.5B ETF inflows, 16 SEC commodities — strongest fundamentals during extreme fear in crypto history.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides 21 days to April 15. Peak search volume window approaching.
BLOCKED: Git index.lock persists — deploy gap widening. Requires manual intervention.
